raw_extraction.innovation: Pre-trained on multilingual data with 8B parameters, optimized for English use case initially; follows standard dense Transformer architecture with next-token prediction
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: ~15T multilingual tokens (including curated web data, code, and reasoning-focused content)
raw_extraction.application: Multilingual language understanding, coding, reasoning, instruction-following
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, high-performance language models supporting multilinguality, coding, reasoning, and tool usage
raw_extraction.extension: **Code expert specialization**: Continued pre-training on 1T tokens of code data (>85%) with LCFT to 16K tokens for extended context handling.

raw_extraction.innovation: Post-trained variant of Llama 3 8B with instruction alignment via supervised finetuning (SFT) and Direct Preference Optimization (DPO); supports tool-use and improved safety
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Same as base model (~15T multilingual tokens) + instruction tuning data
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-following, chat applications, tool-use, multilingual assistance
raw_extraction.research_problem: Instruction-following and aligned behavior in language models

raw_extraction.innovation: Pre-trained on multilingual data with 70B parameters, optimized for broader capabilities; follows standard dense Transformer architecture with next-token prediction
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: ~15T multilingual tokens (including curated web data, code, and reasoning-focused content)
raw_extraction.application: Multilingual language understanding, advanced reasoning, coding, and tool-use
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, high-performance language models supporting multilinguality, coding, reasoning, and tool usage
raw_extraction.extension: **Negative log-likelihood regularization** (NLL loss coefficient of 0.2) to stabilize DPO training and maintain desired formatting.

raw_extraction.innovation: Post-trained variant of Llama 3 70B with instruction alignment via supervised finetuning (SFT) and Direct Preference Optimization (DPO); enhanced tool-use and safety mechanisms
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Same as base model (~15T multilingual tokens) + instruction tuning data
raw_extraction.application: Advanced instruction-following, chat applications, tool-use, and multilingual assistance
raw_extraction.research_problem: Instruction-following and aligned behavior in language models

raw_extraction.innovation: Updated version of Llama 3 8B with improved data quality, larger-scale training (3.8×10^25 FLOPs), and extended context window to 128K tokens; optimized for multilinguality, coding, reasoning, and tool-use
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: ~15T multilingual tokens (curated web data, code, reasoning, and improved filtering)
raw_extraction.application: Multilingual language understanding, coding, reasoning, instruction-following, and tool-use
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, high-performance language models with enhanced capabilities and safety
raw_extraction.extension: Extended context window to 128K tokens via continued pre-training

raw_extraction.innovation: Six-round **iterative alignment pipeline** integrating **rejection sampling**, **synthetic data generation**, and **semantic deduplication** for high-quality, diverse training data. Uses **model averaging** across checkpoints from each round to enhance robustness.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus (general + specialized domain-specific data)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose chatbot, instruction-following, code generation, multilingual support, reasoning, long-context processing, tool-use, and factuality
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, capable language models with strong instruction-following, code generation, and alignment capabilities
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF)-style alignment via Reward Modeling (RM) and Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) across 6 iterative rounds, with **rejection sampling**, **synthetic data augmentation**, and **topic/classification-based pruning**
raw_extraction.hardware_used: Two machines with 16 Nvidia H100 GPUs
raw_extraction.extension: **Model averaging** across checkpoints from each post-training round to enhance stability and generalization.

raw_extraction.innovation: Integration of multimodal capabilities (vision, speech) via adapter-based fusion without finetuning the base language model, achieving competitive performance with state-of-the-art models like Gemini 1.0 Ultra and GPT-4 Vision.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus + multimodal data (images, audio)
raw_extraction.application: Multimodal question answering, image/text/speech reasoning, chat with visual/audio input
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable multimodal language models capable of processing images, text, and speech simultaneously
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning, alignment with human feedback, multimodal adapter-based fine-tuning
raw_extraction.extension: Adapter-based fusion enables modular multimodal integration without modifying the base language model architecture.
